blockingIssues.description: Final evidence artifact is anchored to revision 756ec61... but that SHA is not resolvable through GitHub check-runs API, so required-check end-state is not proven for the same revision in remote merge-gate context.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require same-revision validation that required check context names are verified against check-runs for the exact SHA used in final evidence before marking gate end-state configured.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for confidence-final-required-check-evidence-and-stability found check-runs queried on a different SHA than the artifact's asserted revision.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a validation-artifact convention requiring immutable remote evidence pointers (for example, check-run IDs/URLs tied to asserted SHA) for final gate-readiness claims.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Confidence-gates final evidence report included branch-protection snapshots and local runs, but lacked same-SHA remote check-run linkage, reducing auditability.
